visual_description: The video opens on a very dark, almost black screen. On the far left, a faint watermark with two Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. In the lower right corner, the silhouette of a person's head and shoulders can be seen, suggesting they are looking down. The camera is static, creating a sense of mystery and anticipation. The scene cuts to a medium shot of a man and a woman in what appears to be an office. The woman, with long dark hair, is standing and leaning over the man, who is seated at a desk. She is wearing a light-colored, possibly white, blouse. The man, seen from the back, is wearing a dark shirt. The office is cluttered, with a wall behind them covered in a dense collage of black-and-white photographs. On the desk, there is a laptop, a mug, and other office supplies. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top left corner. The camera is slightly shaky, giving the scene a candid, in-the-moment feel. A man's voice calls out in a clear, slightly loud tone, "Fanny!" A woman responds with a quick and cheerful "Hey!" The camera pans slightly to the right, revealing more of the office environment.
